subcodes.title: Words to President of the Touranian Society, Ritz Hotel in Budapest, 1913-04-12
subcodes.first_line: Your aim, of course, is the realization of Universal Peace, but with what power or with what executive force will you be able to bring it about? In the matter of universal peace a great, universal Power is necessary, which we may name a "Universal Collective Center"
subcodes.subjects: @nationalism; love of country, @universal peace; world unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @unity of governments; political unity
